features.name: unpacked array memory with indexed write in FSM case
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array (memory) where indexed write operations occur inside an FSM-style case statement with multiple states

features.name: array index variable updated in FSM with conditional memory write
features.description: Code should include an FSM where a register used as array index is updated across states and used conditionally to write to unpacked array memory

features.name: cross-state array read after indexed write pattern
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array where a write at index X occurs in one FSM state and a read at index Y occurs in a subsequent FSM state
